title: Replay Governance Decision
description: Governed artifact produced by the BY Replay Governance Gate. Consumes a replay_decision_analysis artifact and emits an enforceable system_response governing downstream execution and promotion decisions. Replay drift is no longer advisory telemetry — it is an operational control signal.

artifact_type.description: Identifies this artifact as a replay governance decision. Must always equal 'replay_governance_decision'.

replay_analysis_artifact_id.description: The analysis_id from the replay_decision_analysis artifact consumed by this gate. Null when no replay artifact was provided.

run_id.description: Identifier of the pipeline run being governed.

evaluated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this governance decision was evaluated.

replay_status.description: The replay consistency status from the consumed replay_decision_analysis artifact. Null when no replay artifact was provided.

replay_consistency_sli.description: The reproducibility_score from the replay_decision_analysis artifact mapped to a replay consistency SLI in [0, 1]. Null when no replay artifact was provided.

governance_policy.description: The governance policy applied to produce this decision.

policy_name.description: Name of the governance policy in effect.

policy_version.description: Semver version of the governance policy.

drift_action.description: System response applied when replay_status is 'drifted'.

indeterminate_action.description: System response applied when replay_status is 'indeterminate'.

missing_replay_action.description: System response applied when no replay artifact is present and replay is not required.

require_replay.description: When true, a missing replay artifact is treated as a policy violation using missing_replay_action.

decision.description: The enforceable governance decision emitted by this gate.

system_response.description: The enforceable system response. allow=execution may continue; require_review=must not proceed automatically; quarantine=must not promote/publish; block=execution must stop.

severity.description: Severity level corresponding to the system_response.

replay_governed.description: True when the decision was driven by replay governance (replay artifact was present and valid). False when replay was absent and not required.

rationale_code.description: Machine-readable code explaining the basis for this governance decision.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of the governance decision.

enforcement_reason.description: Structured explanation of why this enforcement decision was reached.

summary.description: One-line summary of the enforcement reasoning.

details.description: Ordered list of detail strings explaining the enforcement decision.

status.description: Operational status of this governance artifact. ok=produced normally; invalid_input=replay artifact was malformed; policy_blocked=policy explicitly blocked.

trace_id.description: Optional. Trace identifier linking this governance decision to the full execution trace.
